name: active-heading
title: Active Heading
description: Configurable active heading detection for table of contents. Tracks which heading is currently active based on scroll position, with top-line or viewport-center activation modes and a programmatic scrollTo helper.

content.text: Watch for DOM changes via MutationObserver. Disable for static content.

docs.description: Configurable active heading detection for table of contents. Tracks which heading is currently active based on scroll position, with top-line or viewport-center activation modes and a programmatic scrollTo helper.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Ordered list of heading element IDs to observe. Elements are resolved via document.getElementById.

parameters.name: containerId
parameters.description: ID of a scrollable container element. When omitted, the window is used as the scroll target.

parameters.name: activation
parameters.description: How headings activate. "top-line" activates when crossing topOffset from container top. "viewport-center" activates at the vertical center. A number (0–1) sets a custom viewport fraction.

parameters.name: topOffset
parameters.description: Pixel offset from the container top used by the "top-line" activation mode.

parameters.name: scrollOffset
parameters.description: Pixel offset applied when scrollTo programmatically scrolls to a heading. Defaults to topOffset.

parameters.name: bottomMargin
parameters.description: Fraction of viewport height used as bottom margin for bottomLock detection.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Fraction (0–1) of the heading element's height that must cross the activation line before it becomes active. 0 = top edge, 1 = bottom edge.

parameters.name: bottomLock
parameters.description: When true, the last heading is always activated when the user scrolls to the bottom of the container.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: Set to false to disable scroll observation. When disabled, activeId is set to null.

parameters.name: settleDelay
parameters.description: Milliseconds to wait after a programmatic scrollTo before resuming scroll tracking. Prevents flickering during smooth scroll animation.

parameters.name: observe
parameters.description: Watch for DOM changes via MutationObserver. Disable for static content.

returns.type: { activeId: string | null; scrollTo: (id: string) => void }
returns.description: Object with the currently active heading ID and a function to programmatically scroll to a heading.

properties.name: activeId
properties.description: ID of the currently active heading, or null when disabled or no headings are found.

properties.name: scrollTo
properties.description: Scrolls to the heading with the given ID. Immediately sets activeId to prevent flickering during the scroll animation.

notes.title: Activation Modes
notes.content: Use "top-line" (default) for fixed-header layouts where headings activate near the top. Use "viewport-center" for centered reading experiences. Pass a number (0–1) for a custom viewport fraction.

notes.title: Scroll Settling
notes.content: When scrollTo is called, scroll-listener updates are suppressed until the animation settles (150ms after the last scroll event). This prevents the active heading from flickering through intermediate headings during programmatic scrolls.

notes.title: Bottom Lock
notes.content: When bottomLock is true (default), the last heading is always highlighted when scrolled to the bottom. This ensures the last section is reachable even if it's shorter than the viewport.

content.text: sticky top-24 flex w-48 shrink-0 flex-col gap-1 self-start
see the active heading update in the sidebar navigation.
sticky top-24 flex w-48 shrink-0 flex-col gap-1 self-start
top-line and viewport-center modes to see how the active heading
